name: Alcohol and Your Brain - A Rollercoaster Ride Through Your Brain - NIAAA/NIH

reviews.review_title: I did not know what to put as the title
reviews.review_description: So I think it was great in terms of teaching you how drinking is bad for you but the cons are that the ride sucks

So I loved that it was voice acted and it was all right however.... It caused my eyes to hurt like fire out of Satan's butt. It seemed like it was really good reference points and all that but nothing was properly credited towards the correct websites or anything and I know the purpose of this was to bring awareness to alcohol abuse however points was vague.
